integrity.description: Ensure the agent wrote functional carving logic rather than hardcoding test-passing print statements or exact byte offsets.

integrity.description: Ensure the test results are from an actual test runner execution.
integrity.visual_evidence: The test output should be in a standard PyCharm test runner pane or a genuine terminal execution, not a manually created text file or an 'echo' command.

integrity.description: Ensure the recovered files were generated by the Python script and not manually copied.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be evidence of the carver script being executed to populate the 'recovered_files/' directory, rather than terminal commands like 'cp' or 'mv' moving files from elsewhere.
